howItWorks.intro: This password strength calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Entropy
rules.explanation: Bits of entropy based on character pool and password length.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: 12+ characters with mixed case, numbers, and symbols. Length matters most.

faq.q: How fast can passwords be cracked?
faq.a: Modern GPUs can try 10 billion combinations per second against common hashes.

howWeCalculate.intro: This password strength calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.

Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.

When comparing different options or scenarios side by side
